omitted_declarations.policy_reference: The personal information to be collected and transferred will include, but not limited to, days of your account registration, active hours of your account, the in-app virtual merchandise you have purchased, usage of your purchased in-app virtual merchandise, value of your purchased in-app virtual merchandise, etc.

PolyBuzz will automatically collect and save user network logs, including browser type, browsing records, network diagnosis, so that we can evaluate use of PolyBuzz, optimize it and improve our Services.
